PAKISTAN'S #1 OFFLINE POS

Next-Gen Point of Sale.
Built for Pakistan.

Works 100% offline. No monthly fees. Handles restaurants, salons, medical clinics & retail — all in one powerful system.

Download for PC Free • Windows 10 & 11 • 80MB Try Free 14-Day Full Access
✓No monthly fee ✓Works offline ✓Free setup ✓24/7 support
BUILT FOR YOUR BUSINESS

One Platform. Every Industry.

From restaurants to retail, Nove POS adapts to your world — not the other way around.

Restaurant & Café

The Ultimate POS for Food & Beverage

Automate Kitchen Order Tickets (KOTs), manage table bookings, split bills across guests, and track raw ingredients — all with 100% offline reliability so your kitchen never stops.

  • ✓ Automated KOT & Kitchen Display
  • ✓ Split Billing & Table Management
  • ✓ Recipe & Ingredient Tracking
  • ✓ 100% Offline Capability
Explore Restaurant POS →
Salon & Beauty

Premium POS for Salons & Spas

Book appointments, manage staff commissions, sell retail products and track daily revenue — everything your salon needs in one elegant, intuitive system.

  • ✓ Appointment Scheduling
  • ✓ Staff Commission Management
  • ✓ Product & Service Billing
  • ✓ Client History & Loyalty
Explore Salon POS →
Medical & Healthcare

Smart Billing for Clinics & Hospitals

Manage patient records, doctor schedules, prescriptions and billing — a comprehensive healthcare management system built for modern clinics and hospitals.

  • ✓ Patient Record Management
  • ✓ Doctor Scheduling & Fees
  • ✓ Medicine & Pharmacy Billing
  • ✓ Insurance & Detailed Reports
Explore Medical POS →
Mobile & Electronics

Precision POS for Electronics Retail

Track IMEI numbers, manage warranties, handle buy-back pricing and accessory bundles with our specialized electronics retail module built for mobile shops.

  • ✓ IMEI & Serial Number Tracking
  • ✓ Warranty Management
  • ✓ Buy-Back & Trade-In Pricing
  • ✓ Accessory Bundle Sales
Explore Mobile POS →
Retail & General Store

Complete POS for Retail & Shops

Barcode scanning, real-time stock alerts, multi-category inventory and a full customer credit ledger — the ultimate, no-compromise toolkit for retail success.

  • ✓ Barcode Scanning & Generation
  • ✓ Real-Time Low Stock Alerts
  • ✓ Customer Credit Ledger
  • ✓ Multi-Category Inventory
Explore Retail POS →

WHY NOVE

Focus on your business —
not the app.

An intuitive Point of Sale application designed to simplify sales, reduce clicks, and let you get back to what matters.

Grow smarter!

Nove simplifies business management with an intuitive design and powerful tools that adapt to your needs, helping you focus on growth and customer satisfaction.

Stay ahead!

Streamline your daily operations, reduce complexity, and ensure your business stays ahead with Nove's reliable and feature-rich platform.

Built for you!

Tailored to your unique business needs, Nove combines simplicity and innovation to give you a POS system that grows with you.

Multicompany

Handle more than one company or multiple locations effortlessly within a single NOVE instance.

📦

Inventory

Keep track of complete movement of all products from purchase, sale, return and other crucial info.

👥

Customers

Add customers instantly during checkout and easily manage their debit/credit ledger and history.

🧠

NOVE AI Insights

Intelligent auditing and sales forecasting that predicts trends and optimizes your business growth.

WHAT CLIENTS SAY

Trusted by businesses across Pakistan

Real feedback from real business owners using NOVE POS every day.

★★★★★

"NOVE POS completely transformed how we manage our electronics shop. The inventory alerts alone have saved us from running out of stock three times this month. The AI insights are genuinely impressive."

AR
Ahmad Raza
Owner — TechZone Electronics, Lahore
★★★★★

"We run three clothing stores across Karachi. Before NOVE, syncing between locations was a nightmare. Now everything is real-time. The multicompany feature is worth the price alone."

SK
Sara Khan
Director — Elegance Boutique, Karachi
★★★★★

"The offline mode is a lifesaver in areas with unstable internet. My team processes hundreds of transactions daily without a single sync error. Customer support responds in minutes. Incredible product."

MH
Muhammad Hassan
CEO — Hassan General Store, Faisalabad
WHY SWITCH

NOVE vs the competition

See why thousands of businesses choose NOVE over generic alternatives.

Feature NOVE POS ⭐ Square POS QuickBooks POS Generic POS
Works 100% Offline ✓ Full Offline Partial ✗ Partial
AI Sales Insights ✓ Built-in Add-on ✗ ✗
Multicompany / Multi-Branch ✓ Native Limited ✓ ✗
PKR / Local Currency Support ✓ Full Support ✗ ✗ Varies
Google Drive Backup ✓ Auto Hourly ✗ ✗ ✗
Debtors Ledger ✓ Advanced ✗ Basic ✗
One-Time License Option ✓ Available ✗ Monthly Only ✗ Monthly Only Varies
